name: pokechamps
description: Pokemon Champions / VGC battle assistant — bring decisions, damage prediction, opponent stat inference.

scripts.typecheck: npm -w @pokechamps/core run typecheck && npm -w @pokechamps/tui run typecheck && npm -w @pokechamps/server run typecheck && npm -w @pokechamps/web run typecheck && npm -w @pokechamps/vision run typecheck && npm -w @pokechamps/control run typecheck
scripts.test: npm -w @pokechamps/core test && npm -w @pokechamps/server test && npm -w @pokechamps/tui test && npm -w @pokechamps/web test && npm -w @pokechamps/vision test && npm -w @pokechamps/control test
